channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Transport Stakeholder Kennedy Kaunda Clarifies Confrontation with CS Wandayi over Fuel Prices
item.description: Kennedy Kaunda, a well-known transport sector stakeholder and CEO of the East Africa Tour Guides and Drivers Association (EATGDA), has finally spoken out about his interruption of Energy Cabinet Secre...

item.title: Shettima Denies Allegation of Plotting Against President Tinubu
item.description: Vice-President Kashim Shettima don yan say some people try to create wahala between am and President Bola Tinubu few months after dem start office. E talk say na people from Borno State wey no wan mak...

item.title: addlink Presents 2026 Virtual Showcase Featuring Advanced Storage and Memory Solutions
item.description: Addlink Technology Corp. has launched its 2026 Virtual Showcase, offering an online preview of its latest storage and memory products designed for AI PCs, gaming systems, content creators, and general...

item.title: PM Shehbaz Highlights Ongoing Operation Ghazab lil-Haq and Armed Forces’ Commitment to National Security
item.description: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif visited the Command and Staff College in Quetta on Tuesday, lauding the professionalism, operational preparedness, and sacrifices of the Pakistan Armed Forces. During his...

item.title: Qantas faces major route cuts and rising fares amid jet fuel shortages caused by Iran conflict
item.description: The ongoing conflict between the US, Israel, and Iran has severely disrupted the global aviation sector, with jet fuel supply particularly affected in the Eastern Hemisphere. Since the outbreak of hos...

item.title: Justice Department announces $1.8 billion fund to compensate Trump allies, with eligibility rules under review
item.description: Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche has announced a nearly $1.8 billion fund intended to compensate supporters of former President Donald Trump, including donors, who claim to have been victims of go...

item.title: TMC Candidate Jahangir Khan Withdraws Ahead of Falta Repolling Citing Development Promises
item.description: Two days prior to the repolling scheduled in Falta assembly constituency of West Bengal, Trinamool Congress (TMC) candidate Jahangir Khan has officially withdrawn from the election. Addressing the med...

item.title: House of Representatives Assigns Prosecutors for Sara Duterte Impeachment Case
item.description: The House of Representatives is preparing for the impeachment proceedings against Sara Duterte, focusing on which prosecutors will be assigned to handle the case. While the specific members of the pro...

item.title: ITV confirms World Cup pundit line-up without Eni Aluko following disagreement with Ian Wright
item.description: ITV has announced its coverage team for the 2026 World Cup, featuring a high-profile roster including Gary Neville, Roy Keane, Patrick Vieira, and former Spurs manager Ange Postecoglou. Despite having...

item.title: Welsh First Minister Outlines Priorities and Discusses Independence with UK Labour Leader
item.description: Rhun ap Iorwerth, the newly appointed First Minister of Wales, has confirmed that he spoke with UK Labour leader Sir Keir Starmer about Welsh independence shortly after his electoral victory. While Pl...

item.title: Challenges and Inequities in Managing Public Land Access Through Recreation.gov
item.description: Recreation.gov, the federal platform designed to streamline public land reservations and make access more equitable, has faced major challenges. The system manages reservations for river permits, nati...

item.title: Behind-the-Scenes Glimpse of Gina Lollobrigida in 'Anna of Brooklyn' (1958)
item.description: The 1958 romantic comedy 'Anna of Brooklyn' (originally 'Anna di Brooklyn') features the legendary Italian actress Gina Lollobrigida in the lead role of Anna, a wealthy young widow from New York. Seek...

item.title: Allegations of Irregularities Mar APC Bomadi/Patani House of Reps Primary Election
item.description: New gist don show say the All Progressives Congress (APC) primary election wey dem hold for Bomadi/Patani Federal Constituency get serious wahala. People dey allege say some officials wey suppose cond...

item.title: Expert Urges Nigeria to Align Tax System with Global Standards for Better Revenue and Growth
item.description: A prominent tax expert and auditor, Olayinka Oyebola, don call for quick reform to make Nigeria tax system follow global best practices. According to him, this kind of alignment go help strengthen com...

item.title: Enzo Maresca Reaches Verbal Agreement to Become Manchester City Manager
item.description: Ex-Chelsea coach Enzo Maresca don reportedly reach verbal agreement with Manchester City to take over as their next manager. Dis reports say say e be one of the top choices to succeed Pep Guardiola an...

item.title: Stage-I Pollution Control Measures Enforced in Delhi-NCR as Air Quality Worsens
item.description: On 19th May 2026, the air quality in Delhi-NCR deteriorated to a 'poor' level, prompting authorities to implement Stage-I measures under the Graded Response Action Plan (GRAP). According to the Commis...

item.title: Kikuletwa Hydropower Plant to Boost Tanzania’s Northern Electricity Supply
item.description: Tanzania is making big moves in energy independence with the new Kikuletwa hydropower plant at the Renewable Energy Training and Research Centre in Kilimanjaro Region. This modern facility will help r...

item.title: Authorities investigate distribution of possibly substandard steel from raided Tagoloan plant in Misamis Oriental
item.description: Philippine authorities are now tracing the distribution of potentially substandard steel products following a major raid at a steel plant in Tagoloan, Misamis Oriental. The operation, conducted by joi...

item.title: ‘The Mandalorian and Grogu’ Marks the Return of Star Wars to Cinemas with Box Office Expectations
item.description: After a seven-year hiatus from theaters, 'Star Wars' returns with 'The Mandalorian and Grogu,' testing whether the franchise still captivates audiences, particularly younger viewers. The film, a conti...

item.title: UN Warns Kenya and World on Slow Progress in Making Buildings Climate-Friendly
item.description: A fresh report from the United Nations Environment Programme (UNEP) and the Global Alliance for Buildings and Construction (GlobalABC) has flagged that efforts to reduce carbon emissions in the buildi...
